Auth._comment_audience: Audience is the OIDC client_id provisioned by zitadel-bootstrap; injected via Auth__Audience or the KeyPerFile secret. Default placeholder makes startup fail loudly if the bootstrap step hasn't run.
Auth._comment_https: Plain HTTP in dev; prod overrides via Auth__RequireHttps=true.

Turnstile._comment: Cloudflare's documented dev-only test keys. The site key is always-passes, the secret accepts any token. Swap both via config in prod.
